programmes.show_description: (2012) Colin Farrell, Sam Rockwell, Christopher Walken and Woody Harrelson star in Martin McDonagh's comedy thriller about a screenwriter who gets dangerously mixed up with the Mob.

programmes.show_name: Journey to the Center of the Earth
programmes.show_description: (1959) Fantasy adventure starring James Mason, Pat Boone and Diane Baker. An expedition to the centre of the planet unexpectedly encounters a villainous rival and prehistoric beasts.
...in Their Flying Machines: (1965) Newspaper boss Robert Morley puts up a £10,000 prize for the winner of a flight from London to Paris, and soon a motley assortment of aviators is ready.
(1992) Comedy starring Whoopi Goldberg. A casino singer who witnesses a Mob murder goes into hiding at a convent, where she soon has the choir rocking. With Maggie Smith.
(1992) High-stakes courtroom drama with more than a few good actors, including Jack Nicholson, Demi Moore and Tom Cruise. Can a lackadaisical naval lawyer crack a battle-hardened colonel?
(1999) Drama with Tom Hanks and Michael Clarke Duncan. Strange events occur when a man convicted of raping and murdering two young girls arrives on death row in a Louisiana prison.
(2019) M. Night Shyamalan directs an all-star cast in this genre-bending superhero sequel. Three superhumans team up to escape a psychiatric ward. With Bruce Willis in a cagoule.
(1963) Classic interpretation of the Greek myth of Jason's quest to find the Golden Fleece, boasting the enduring work of special effects maestro Ray Harryhausen. Directed by Don Chaffey.
(1997) Sci-fi comedy. Tommy Lee Jones and Will Smith star as top-secret agents who monitor and hush up the presence of aliens on Earth - and discover one scary critter's deadly plot.
(2002) Tommy Lee Jones and Will Smith star in the tough action sequel to their sci-fi comedy about US government agents who secretly protect Earth from extraterrestrial criminals.
(2012) Sci-fi comedy sequel with Will Smith, Tommy Lee Jones and Josh Brolin. Agent J travels to the 1960s to save his friend from being killed by a monstrous alien.
(2019) Fourth instalment of the sci-fi comedy franchise with Chris Hemsworth, Tessa Thompson and Liam Neeson. An alien-obsessed rookie joins London's Men in Black team.
(2011) Thriller with Jason Statham and Donald Sutherland. A hitman is ordered to kill his mentor, but then takes on the dead man's son as an apprentice. Could get complicated... and deadly.
(1995) Al Pacino and Robert De Niro star in Michael Mann's crime thriller. A cop sets out to track down a career criminal and his gang of armed robbers. Violence/strong language.
